Backup Maker v1.0.4.0

Usage
  dotnet Backup Maker.dll [command]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands

  addfile
  remove
  show
  start

You can run `dotnet Backup Maker.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Usage
  dotnet Backup Maker.dll add <filename> <folderlocation> <foldersavelocation>

Parameters
* filename          Name of the file.
* folderlocation    folder location.
* foldersavelocation folder backup location.

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

Usage
  dotnet Backup Maker.dll addfile <filename> <filelocation> <folderslocation> <foldersavelocation>

Parameters
* filename          Name of the file to store.
* filelocation      File location conatining folder names.
* folderslocation   Folders location.
* foldersavelocation folder backup location.

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
